name: opencode-supermemory-max
description: Enhanced OpenCode memory plugin — Japanese support, incremental capture, signal extraction, 3-tier scopes, dedup, entity context. Fork of opencode-supermemory with aggressive memory maximization.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node && bun build ./src/cli.ts --outfile ./dist/cli.js --target node && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly

author: Kan Ninomiya <ninomiya@kan.run>
